title: AI Systems Engineer
description_text: Design and develop AI/ML systems for defense avionics. This position requires the ability to obtain a U.S. Security Clearance for which the U.S. Government requires U.S. Citizenship. Secret Clearance Post-Start is required. Relocation assistance is not a negotiable benefit for this position. Experience with DO-178C and machine learning model validation preferred.

title: Machine Learning Engineer - Autonomous Systems
description_text: Develop machine learning models for autonomous flight path planning and sensor fusion. This position does not require a Security Clearance. This position offers relocation based on candidate eligibility. U.S. Person required for export control compliance.

title: Data Scientist - Manufacturing AI
description_text: Develop AI-powered quality control systems for aircraft manufacturing. Apply machine learning and computer vision to defect detection. Python, TensorFlow, MLOps required. No security clearance required. No citizenship requirement. Relocation package available.

title: AI Research Engineer - Flight Simulation
description_text: Research and develop AI algorithms for next-generation flight simulation. Focus on reinforcement learning and synthetic data generation. No Security Clearance required. Relocation assistance is not available.

title: AI/ML Solutions Architect - Defense
description_text: Lead AI/ML solution design for defense intelligence clients. Apply LLMs, computer vision, NLP to national security problems. Active TS/SCI clearance required. Must be a U.S. Citizen. Relocation assistance available.

title: Systems Engineer - Autonomous Control
description_text: Design and verify autonomous control systems for defense and space. Experience with ARP4754A, MBSE, V&V required. Requires ability to obtain Secret clearance. U.S. Citizenship required. Relocation assistance is not a negotiable benefit.

title: Principal AI/ML Engineer - Autonomy
description_text: Lead development of autonomous systems algorithms for unmanned platforms. Apply ML, computer vision, path planning. TS/SCI clearance required. U.S. Citizenship mandatory. Relocation based on candidate eligibility. DO-178C certification experience a strong plus.

title: Data Engineer - Predictive Maintenance
description_text: Build data pipelines for predictive maintenance AI models. Sensor telemetry, data quality, MLOps. Python, Spark, Kubernetes. No security clearance required. No citizenship requirement. Relocation assistance available.

title: Autonomy Software Engineer
description_text: Develop autonomy software for launch vehicle GNC. C++, Python, real-time systems. ITAR: U.S. Person required. Secret clearance preferred but not required. Relocation assistance provided.

title: Machine Learning Infrastructure Engineer
description_text: Build ML training and inference infrastructure for additive manufacturing AI quality systems. MLOps, Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD. No clearance required. Relocation based on candidate eligibility. ITAR: U.S. Person.

title: AI/ML Engineer - Starship Autonomy
description_text: Develop and deploy ML models for autonomous launch and landing. Deep learning, computer vision, sensor fusion. No security clearance required. ITAR: U.S. Person. Relocation assistance available.

title: Propulsion AI Engineer
description_text: Apply machine learning to hypersonic propulsion test data analysis and anomaly detection. Python, data pipelines, real-time sensor data. No Security Clearance required. Relocation assistance is not available. ITAR: U.S. Person required.

title: Autonomy Software Engineer - eVTOL
description_text: Design and implement autonomy algorithms for eVTOL flight control and DAA systems. Path planning, detect-and-avoid, ARP4754A certification process. No clearance required. No citizenship requirement. Relocation assistance available.

title: AI Systems Engineer - Electronic Warfare
description_text: Develop AI/ML algorithms for EW signal classification and autonomous threat response. Neural networks, signal processing, Python. Active Secret clearance required. Must be U.S. Citizen. No relocation assistance. CA: $115,000–$145,000. FL: $98,000–$128,000. TX: $102,000–$132,000.

title: Program Manager - AI Modernization
description_text: Lead AI modernization programs for DoD intelligence systems. ML-based ISR solutions. PMP preferred. Active TS/SCI with CI Poly required. Must be U.S. Citizen. Relocation assistance available. VA: $145,000–$185,000. MD: $142,000–$182,000.
